strings.confirmationModalDescription: Are you sure you want to manage this externally? It could let users erase all previously uploaded {localUnitType} Local Units during bulk import.
strings.confirmationSuccessEnabledMessage: Successfully enabled Local Unit Type to manage externally!
strings.confirmationSuccessDisabledMessage: Successfully disabled Local Unit Type to manage externally!
strings.confirmationFailedMessage: Failed to update the manage externally status for the Local Unit Type
